TextView.android:text:
🍉Nutrition Guide

1. Fruit Salad
Rich in Vitamin C and fiber; provides quick energy from natural sugars.

2. Grilled Chicken
Excellent source of lean protein for muscle repair and B-vitamins for metabolism.

3. Vegetable Stir Fry
High in fiber and phytonutrients like beta-carotene (from carrots) and Vitamin K (from broccoli).

4. Oatmeal Breakfast
Packed with soluble fiber (beta-glucan) which helps lower cholesterol and stabilizes blood sugar.

5. Avocado Toast
Provides heart-healthy monounsaturated fats, potassium, and Vitamin E.

6. Boiled Eggs
A complete protein source containing all essential amino acids and Vitamin D.

7. Smoothie Bowl
Concentrated source of antioxidants and probiotics if using yogurt; high in various vitamins.

8. Brown Rice and Beans
A plant-based complete protein high in complex carbohydrates and iron.

9. Baked Fish
Rich in Omega-3 fatty acids for heart and brain health, plus high-quality protein.

10. Greek Yogurt with Honey
High in calcium and protein for bone health; contains probiotics for better digestion.
